title: Spooky (Mojang Office) elytra item
description: A texturepack for the compatibility of the item and the actual elytra with the new cape!
body:
### A texturepack for the compatibility of the item and the actual elytra with the new Mojang Office cape!

You can get this resourcepack also from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/java-spooky-mojang-office-elytra-item/)!

**NOTE: This does not modify the elytra itself. It only modifies the item.**
